exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
graph TD
    subgraph Cloud Providers
        AWS_S3[Amazon S3] -->|Object Storage| Kubernetes
        Azure_Functions[Azure Functions] -->|Serverless Compute| Kubernetes
        GCP_BigQuery[Google BigQuery] -->|Data Analytics| Kubernetes
    end
    subgraph Kubernetes
        Kubernetes -->|Orchestration| AWS_S3
        Kubernetes -->|Orchestration| Azure_Functions
        Kubernetes -->|Orchestration| GCP_BigQuery
    end
    subgraph Applications
        App1[Application 1] -->|Data Ingestion| AWS_S3
        App2[Application 2] -->|Event Processing| Azure_Functions
        App3[Application 3] -->|Data Querying| GCP_BigQuery
    end
    subgraph Networks
        VPC1[VPC 1] -.->|Network Connectivity| Kubernetes
        VPC2[VPC 2] -.->|Network Connectivity| Kubernetes
    end
    AWS_S3 -.-> |Data Replication| GCP_BigQuery
    Azure_Functions -.-> |Function Invocation| App2
    GCP_BigQuery -.-> |Query Results| App3
